scope: Make xai/ a first-class native driver prefix: xai/grok-4.5 resolves through the driver registry to xAI's OpenAI-compatible API using XAI_API_KEY, declaring implementer/verifier/captain roles, surfaced by sworn capabilities and sworn models, with real grok-4.5 pricing.

reachability.evidence: XAI_API_KEY=sk-smoke-test sworn capabilities -> oai-inprocess lists prefix 'xai/', roles 'implementer,verifier,captain', 'available: yes - API keys present: xai/'. With no key: 'xai/' still listed, 'available: no'. sworn models --provider zzz -> 'valid providers: ..., openrouter, xai'. No live xAI dispatch; structured path proven via httptest (TestXAI_ChatStructured_ResponseFormat).

delivered.item: AC-01 — the driver registry resolves xai/grok-4.5 to the in-process oai chat driver for implementer/verifier/captain roles, configured for https://api.x.ai/v1 with XAIKey.
delivered.evidence: internal/driver/registry/registry.go (xai in chatPrefixes + keyFor case); internal/model/provider.go (NewClient case xai). Tests: TestResolveXAIRoles, TestDefaultRegistryTable, TestRegistryNewClientConsistency (registry_test.go); TestNewClient_OAICompat row xai/grok-4.5, TestNewClient_XAIStructured (provider_test.go).

delivered.item: AC-02 — sworn capabilities lists the xai driver available when XAI_API_KEY present and unavailable when absent, no dispatch.
delivered.evidence: cmd/sworn/capabilities_test.go TestCapabilitiesListsXAI (both key-present and key-absent subtests); clearProviderEnv extended to blank XAI_API_KEY/SWORN_XAI_API_KEY. Smoke: reachability evidence above. Availability is credential-presence only via keyProbe/keyFor (no dispatch).

delivered.item: AC-03 — xai/ emits schema-constrained structured output (StructuredResponseFormat) that validates, through the model ChatStructured path (httptest, no live dispatch).
delivered.evidence: internal/model/provider.go (NewClient xai sets Structured: StructuredResponseFormat). Tests: TestXAI_ChatStructured_ResponseFormat (structured_test.go) drives ChatStructured through the NewClient-resolved xai client, asserting strict json_schema response_format + normalised content; TestNewClient_XAIStructured asserts the mode. Live acceptance doc-confirmed only (docs.x.ai); D2 StructuredToolCall is the contained fallback.

delivered.item: AC-04 — sworn models --provider xai enumerates xAI models (fail-closed unknown), grok-4.5 carries a real non-zero pricing entry, and build + targeted tests pass.
delivered.evidence: internal/model/xai.go (listXAIModels via parseCatalogBareIDList -> ToolSupportUnknown; xaiPricing grok-4.5 {3.00,15.00}); internal/model/catalog.go (xai def appended last); internal/model/client.go (xaiPricing wired into PriceForModel). Tests: TestCatalogAnnotations xai subtest, TestCatalogProviderNames (8 entries, xai last), TestPricing_Grok45 (catalog_test.go/pricing_test.go). go build ./... + full go test pass.

not_delivered.item: Exact grok-4.5 published per-1M pricing confirmation — the entry uses xAI's Grok flagship tier ($3/$15 per 1M, 2026-07-12 snapshot); grok-4.5 may postdate that rate.
not_delivered.why: AC-04 requires only a real non-zero entry so CostSource=pricing-table not unknown (delivered). Exact-rate accuracy is a pricing-snapshot maintenance concern beyond this slice (spec R-4).

divergence.detail: Design D4 said XAIKey: os.Getenv("SWORN_XAI_API_KEY") (SWORN_-only). Implemented as envOrAlias("XAI_API_KEY", "SWORN_XAI_API_KEY") matching the sibling GoogleKey line, because FromEnv passes this pcfg into NewClient and a canonical-XAI_API_KEY-only user must dispatch with a non-empty key. This realises D4's stated intent (honour canonical on the one-shot path) end-to-end; the literal design line would have been a latent bug.
